front: What is the role of solid-phase oligonucleotide synthesis?
back: Phosphoramidite chemistry: 5'-DMTr-protected nucleoside phosphoramidite + activator (tetrazole) + support-bound nucleoside. Coupling efficiency >99%. Oxidation (I2) converts phosphite to phosphate. Deprotection releases oligonucleotide. Automation enables high-throughput synthesis.
